description: Modern Vite / SPA project with a browser-based UI.

tool_chain.purpose: Start Vite dev server if not already running

tool_chain.tool: $BROWSER_TOOL probe — Chrome-MCP (Edge, if connected) → Preview → Playwright
tool_chain.purpose: Resolve the active browser tool. Chrome-MCP (Edge) stays primary when the extension is connected; otherwise Preview is primary for this localhost app (persists login per-baseRepo). Playwright is the next fallback. Never computer-use, never plain Chrome (see deep-knowledge/browser-tool-strategy.md).
Verify DOM content, element presence, and ARIA state

tool_chain.tool: $BROWSER_TOOL console + network read (read_console_messages + read_network_requests / browser_console_messages + browser_network_requests / preview_console_logs)
tool_chain.purpose: Catch runtime JS errors and failed/4xx/5xx requests the snapshot cannot reveal

tool_chain.tool: $BROWSER_TOOL set viewport + screenshot (javascript_tool / browser_evaluate / preview_eval, then screenshot)
tool_chain.purpose: iPhone SE (375x667) — visual layout, mobile iOS
Galaxy Tab S9 / Android tablet (800x1280) — visual layout
